benefits.description: Down nearly 60 pounds and within sight of goal weight
BPC-157 has been a help for tendon and muscle injuries

protocol_notes: User emphasizes importance of sourcing quality batches; one batch of BPC-157 did nothing while another from different vendor worked effectively next day. Notes that effects are noticed within batches and variability exists between vendors. Recommends one change at a time per endocrinologist advice. MOTS-C is described as helping existing mitochondrial function, while SS-31 is described as a repair peptide.
